items.title: Deep Research: Equational Theories Project
items.description: Conduct comprehensive research on the Equational Theories Project: understand the 4694 laws, implication relationships, mathematical structure of magmas, and how equations relate to each other. Use ultrathink methodology for deep first-principles understanding.

items.title: Analysis: Competition Rules and Evaluation Framework
items.description: Thoroughly analyze all competition rules, evaluation criteria, model constraints (10KB cheatsheet limit, no-tools evaluation setting), scoring methodology, and success metrics. Identify key constraints and optimization opportunities.

items.title: Research: State-of-the-Art Mathematical Reasoning
items.description: Research current state-of-the-art approaches for LLM mathematical reasoning, few-shot learning techniques, prompt engineering for math problems, and cheatsheet optimization strategies. Include Honda, Murakami, Zhang (2025) findings.

items.title: Specify: Cheatsheet Requirements and Constraints
items.description: Create detailed specification for the cheatsheet including: structure (sections, subsections), content requirements, size constraints (10KB), target audience (lower-cost LLMs), validation criteria, and success metrics.

items.title: Plan: Research Infrastructure and Experimentation Strategy
items.description: Create comprehensive implementation plan for: data acquisition (equations.txt, training problems), research infrastructure setup, experimentation methodology, validation approach, iteration strategy, and timeline. Include tooling for automated evaluation.

items.title: Execute: Data Pipeline and Initial Analysis
items.description: Implement data pipeline to load and parse the 4694 equations, build implication lookup structures, create problem-evaluation harness. Perform initial exploratory analysis: equation frequencies, common implication patterns, key hub equations.

items.title: Execute: Cheatsheet v1 Draft and Initial Testing
items.description: Draft initial cheatsheet based on research insights. Test against sample training problems. Measure baseline improvement. Analyze errors and identify improvement areas.

items.title: Execute: Iterative Cheatsheet Refinement
items.description: Iterate on cheatsheet based on v1 results: compress less effective sections, expand high-impact areas, add missing patterns, reorganize for clarity. Validate with cross-validation on training set.

items.title: Execute: Final Validation and Documentation
items.description: Final validation of cheatsheet on held-out test set. Comprehensive documentation of methodology, findings, and recommendations. Prepare for Stage 1 submission.
